'''Truuzdann''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Corellian sector/Legends|Corellian sector]]. It was primarily visited for its small [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]].

[[Cornelius Evazan/Legends|Cornelius Evazan]] was seen in Truuzdann by the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jodo Kast]]. Kast was searching for Evazan's head [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] and pursued him. But Evazan escaped thanks to [[Ponda Baba/Legends|Ponda Baba]], who became his new partner.

{{Planet-stub}}
